text:
Once upon a time there was a farmer who lived among tall oak trees. Every evening he would sit by the shore, watching the sun dip low into the sea.

One evening a strange creature flew into his garden. It had wings the color of amber moonlight and a head like a statue of sleep. The farmer watched it fly around for a few minutes before it slowly glided over to his plate.

"What's this?" the farmer said sleepily. The creature landed on his finger and looked up at him. For a long time, neither of them knew what to say.

"I... I don't know what you are," the farmer said politely.

The creature only let out a low chuckle.

"Well," the farmer thought, "at least I don't get any birdfeeder poop."<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
